Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

I'm sure you folks are aware that this change also refers [CVE-2024-6104](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v6v8-xj6m-xwqh) but it looks like it didn't make it to the 5.1.2 cut. Is it because it was clubbed with this c/image change for development reasons? 

Also, I can't open the above redhat issue links so they might already have referenced CVE-2024-6104.
